arts.ttl: Ally McCoist watches AP McCoy nail Celtic colours to the mast as Rangers icon slapped with 'Castle Grayskull' pop
arts.sum: The legendary jockey rode an an all-time record winners and didn't miss when he took on the Ibrox hero

arts.ttl: Cardiff City's Aaron Ramsey pulls out of Wales squad again as Rangers star earns shock recall
arts.sum: Wales captain Aaron Ramsey has been ruled out of Craig Bellamy's latest squad following yet another frustrating injury setback.

arts.ttl: I could’ve turned out for Celtic or Rangers but won the EUROS and played with Adriano and Edgar Davids instead
arts.sum: Former midfield general Giorgos Karagounis says he was once the subject of interest from both sides of the Glasgow divide

arts.ttl: Fenerbache star axed for Rangers rematch as Allan Saint-Maximin goes all cryptic with Mourinho 'truth'
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United wide man Allan Saint-Maximin will not be making the trip to Glasgow for the return leg of the Europa League clash

arts.ttl: Drama as player dumped from squad to face Rangers on his birthday – Posts passage from bible
arts.sum: Last week, Rangers sealed a 3-1 win over Fenerbahçe in the last 16 of the Europa League, thanks to goals from Mohamed Diomande, Cyriel Dessers and Nico Raskin. The return leg will take place at Ibrox on Thursday and the visitors have a tough task on their hands to progress to the next round. arts.ttl: Journalist claims club ‘still keen’ on Rangers player – Director ‘pushing’ to get him
arts.sum: Hamza Igamane has been a regular at Rangers this season and has maintained his place in the starting lineup following Philippe Clement’s exit last month. The Morrocco international has scored 13 goals and registered three assists for Rangers so far and his performances haven’t gone unnoticed. But! arts.ttl: Rangers fans told strict Celtic Park rules as Ibrox club acknowledge 'inconvenient arrival time'
arts.sum: Gers supporters will be housed in the south east corner of the Lisbon Lions stand

arts.ttl: German boss on Rangers' radar - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: RB Leipzig boss Marco Rose, who has also managed Borussia Dortmund and Borussia Monchengladbach, is on Rangers' radar.

arts.ttl: Rangers loan against future transfer fees sees 2 clubs namechecked in documents over outstanding payments
arts.sum: The Ibrox side have taken out an unspecified amount with industry leaders MacQuarie Bank

arts.ttl: Brian Laudrup praying lost Rangers DNA has been found as hurting hero sees echoes of shared master in Barry Ferguson
arts.sum: The Dane and Ferguson both played under Walter Smith and Laudrup reckons Fergie can ease the pain inflicted since Smith's departure
